summary: Iran reinforces a buried nuclear facility while US-Iran talks on the Strait of Hormuz face deadlock. Hezbollah continues rocket and drone attacks on northern Israel.

top_updates.headline: Iran installs roadblocks at buried nuclear facility.
Northern Israel struck by Hezbollah rockets, drones.
Iran Supreme Leader disfigured by US strikes: report.

detailed_analysis: Iran has installed roadblocks at its buried Isfahan nuclear facility entrances, confirming fortification efforts noted in the previous briefing. US-Iran direct talks remain deadlocked over the Strait of Hormuz, with US mine-clearing operations contested by Iranian threats. Hezbollah continues sustained rocket and drone attacks on northern Israel, met by IDF strikes. Reports of the Supreme Leader's disfigurement from US strikes may influence Iran's future responses. Watch for Tehran's strategic shifts amidst these diplomatic and military pressures.
